news.summary: Inuvo, Inc. (NYSE: INUV) recently reported its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. Their revenue reached $26.7 million, exhibiting a substantial 57% surge compared to the previous year, marking it as the highest revenue achievement in the company's history. This exceeded the analyst consensus estimate of $23.7 million. The revenue growth was primarily driven by a striking 61% increase within Platforms and a notable 31% increase within Agencies & Brands. Analysts highlighted Inuvo's alignment with consumer privacy demands and new regulations. A revenue cost of $5.6 million was incurred during this period. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Inuvo Inc. reports 57% revenue growth to $26.7 million in Q1 2025; margin shrinks due to product mix.
2025 Q1 results released by Creative Media & Community Trust Corporation.

news.summary: A recent victory in Beverly Hills sees Lucent Real Estate celebrating a triumph in strategic pricing and reliable collaboration. The off-market transaction involved the sale of a single-family home situated in The Flats of Beverly Hills, concluding at an impressive $7,225,000. This success highlights the effectiveness of the company's approach and the strength of their partnerships.
news.headline: Off-market Beverly Hills home sold for $7.225M by Lucent Real Estate in successful partnership, showcasing strategic pricing.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in New York, families nationwide are encouraged to celebrate the love and care of mothers through the "Laud Mom" campaign by Laudlife. This initiative marks Laudlife's first Mother's Day campaign, aiming to recognize the contributions of mothers.
news.headline: Laudlife's "Laud Mom" campaign celebrates mothers' heroism and love on Mother's Day. NEW YORK, May 9, 2025.

news.summary: Ulta Beauty has incorporated the popular foot peel into its renowned program promoting clean, ethical, and transparent beauty products. In Los Angeles, on May 9, 2025, the original Baby Foot, a leading brand in convenient and efficient foot care solutions, is delighted to be part of this initiative. This move follows Ulta Beauty's dedication to spotlighting products that align with clean and ethical standards. Baby Foot's inclusion in the program emphasizes its commitment to providing consumers with transparently made beauty options.
news.headline: Baby Foot® foot peel joins Ulta Beauty's conscious beauty initiative, promoting clean, ethical, and transparent products. Los Angeles, May 9, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.summary: The Envisia™ platform has been launched by Lightcast in Cambridge, England and Cambridge, Massachusetts, representing a significant development in antibody discovery. This innovative system utilizes droplet-based technology for single-cell functional analysis and has been released for limited commercial use.
news.headline: Lightcast releases Envisia™ platform for antibody discovery, a droplet-based single-cell analysis system.

news.summary: Over two-thirds (66%) of patients with scalp psoriasis and more than three-quarters (77%) with genital psoriasis who received treatment with the experimental drug icotrokinra successfully achieved clear or almost clear skin at Week 16. Icotrokinra has consistently shown remarkable results in clearing skin issues, with a noteworthy percentage of patients reaching a skin clearance rating of 0 or 1 on the Investigator Global Assessment scale by the specified time point.
news.headline: Icotrokinra shows 66% scalp psoriasis and 77% genital psoriasis patients achieve clear skin at Week 16.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on May 9, 2025, the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit announced its Futures Combo Carnival event, a month-long trading competition for Futures Combo traders of all levels. Bybit, ranked as the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, is offering multiple rewards tracks for participants. Traders can qualify for rewards starting at a trading threshold of 300 during the event.
news.headline: Bybit launches Futures Combo Carnival in Dubai, rewarding Futures Combo traders with multiple tracks starting at 300.

Additionally, they announced a collaboration with Jahmal Cole and Chef Helmy Saadon from My Block My Hood My City. The event was part of the Mad Farmer Tour, a nationwide initiative by the company to recognize individuals making a positive impact in their communities.
news.headline: Mad Farmer Tour highlights Chicago block leaders reclaiming community with $20K grants, community meal, and partnerships.

news.summary: Headquartered in Reykjavik, Iceland, on May 9, 2025, Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO), a renowned biotech firm focusing on biosimilar medicines development, will attend the BofA Securities Healthcare Conference 2025 in Las Vegas, Nevada from May 13-15, 2025. The company's executives will hold individual meetings during the event and also engage in a fireside chat on May 14, 2025, from 11:40 am-12:10 pm EDT (15:40-16:10 GMT / 17:40-18:10 CET). This participation signifies Alvotech's commitment to engaging with stakeholders and showcasing its dedication to advancing global healthcare.
news.headline: Alvotech to attend BofA Securities Healthcare Conference in Las Vegas on May 13-15, 2025. Fireside chat on May 14 from 11:40am-12:10pm EDT.

news.summary: Alvotech, a leading biotech company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol ALVO, has disclosed its involvement in the upcoming BofA Securities Healthcare Conference 2025, scheduled to take place in Las Vegas, Nevada from May 13 to May 15, 2025. During the event, key members of the company's management team will be conducting individual meetings. Moreover, on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, at 11:40 am -12:10 pm EDT (15:40-16:10 GMT / 17:40-18:10 CET), Alvotech is slated to engage in a fireside chat session.
news.headline: Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) to attend BofA Securities Healthcare Conference 2025 in Las Vegas, Nevada, May 13-15, with a fireside chat on May 14 at 11:40 am -12:10 pm EDT (15:40-16:10 GMT / 17:40-18:10 CET).

news.headline: Doman Building Materials Group Ltd. shares election results for directors in Canada only; not for dissemination in the US.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 9, 2025, SHARC International Systems Inc. (CSE: SHRC) (FSE: IWIA) (OTCQB: INTWF) shared news that two SHARC 880 Wastewater Energy Transfer ("WET") systems will energize a district energy system in Ottawa, Ontario. This district energy system will support the revitalization of LeBreton Flats and enhance sustainability in the Canadian capital. The SHARC 880 systems are anticipated to play a crucial role in this initiative by leveraging wastewater energy to provide power efficiently.
news.headline: SHARC Energy to power LeBreton Flats redevelopment in Ottawa with 2 WET systems, enhancing district energy.

news.summary: The RMAT designation has been granted based on findings from three clinical trials showcasing the potential advantages of AAV-GAD as a single-dose therapy for Parkinson's disease.
news.headline: MeiraGTx receives FDA RMAT designation for AAV-GAD in treating Parkinson’s disease after 3 successful clinical studies.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Ryman Hospitality Properties revealed the approval of a cash dividend for the second quarter. Shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025, will receive $1.15 per share of common stock on July 15, 2025. The Board of Directors at the Company, listed as RHP on NYSE, announced this decision.
news.headline: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. declares $1.15 per share second quarter dividend, to be paid on July 15, 2025.

news.summary: NextNav Inc., a leader in positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) technology, announced financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. Their revenue increased to $1.5 million from $1.0 million in the prior year period. Operating loss was $17.0 million, up from $16.2 million, primarily due to higher expenses. Net loss was $58.6 million compared to $31.6 million, with $150.4 million in cash and cash equivalents as of March 31, 2025. The FCC's bipartisan vote to explore PNT solutions, including NextNav's, was highlighted. Appointed Rear Admirals H. Wyman Howard and Lorin Selby to the board. NextNav emphasized the importance of a terrestrial PNT solution for national security. They will host a conference call on May 9, 2025, with further details available on their investor relations website. NextNav focuses on driving growth in 3D geolocation and PNT technologies, with risks and uncertainties outlined. Visit their website for more information.
news.headline: NextNav Inc. reported Q1 2025 results, including $1.5 million in revenue. FCC approved NOI with 4-0 vote. Losses include $58.6 million overall, with $150.4 million cash on hand and $213.1 million long term debt as of March 31, 2025. Board of Directors expands with Rear Admirals appointment.

news.summary: Ocugen Inc. reported successful progress in their OCU400 Phase 3 clinical trial for retinitis pigmentosa (RP) and anticipates potential BLA/MAA filings by mid-2026. They also plan to initiate the OCU410ST Phase 2/3 pivotal confirmatory clinical trial for Stargardt disease by mid-2025. The Phase 3 trial for OCU400 includes all eligible RP patients, aiming to treat all 300,000 RP patients in the U.S. and EU. They received FDA alignment for the OCU410ST trial for Stargardt disease affecting 100,000 people in the U.S. and EU. Ocugen's modifier gene therapies for RP, Stargardt disease, and geographic atrophy were granted Advanced Therapy Medicinal Product (ATMP) classification by the EMA. In Q1 2025, they had $38.1 million in cash, with a total of 292.0 million shares outstanding. Operating expenses were $16.0 million, with a net loss of $0.05 per common share. The company plans to discuss these financial results and milestones in a webcast today at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.headline: Ocugen reported Q1 2025 financial results, $38.1M cash on hand, 292M shares outstanding. OCU400 Phase 3 RP trial progressing, 100% improvement. OCU410ST Phase 2/3 for Stargardt disease initiated soon. OCU410 completes Phase 2. Conference call scheduled at 8:30 am ET. Key programs advancing towards commercialization, multiple regulatory milestones met. 3Q 2025 net loss ($0.05/share). For more details: www.ocugen.com.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Dr. Edward Robb, the Chief Strategy Officer at Anivive Lifesciences, delivered a groundbreaking research update on Valley Fever at the 2025 World Vaccine Congress in Washington, D.C. The presentation, entitled "A Double-Edged Sword: Obtaining NIH Funding to Progress," highlighted key findings and advancements in the field. The event saw a large audience with notable attendance from prominent figures in the industry. This marked a significant milestone in the fight against Valley Fever, with Dr. Robb's presentation shedding light on important developments in the quest for a vaccine. The congress featured discussions on various pressing health issues and innovative approaches, underscoring the importance of collaborative efforts in the medical community. Dr. Robb's insights garnered widespread attention, emphasizing the urgency and significance of advancing research in tackling infectious diseases.
news.headline: Anivive presented Valley Fever vaccine research at World Vaccine Congress 2025 by Dr. Edward Robb, Chief Strategy Officer.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, MetaVia Inc. (Nasdaq: MTVA), a clinical-stage biotechnology corporation specializing in addressing cardiometabolic diseases, revealed a private placement initiative. MetaVia forecasts the placement to generate around $10.0 million in gross proceeds.
news.headline: MetaVia Inc. announces $10.0 million private placement at Nasdaq, focusing on cardiometabolic diseases.

news.summary: SelectQuote, Inc., a prominent Medicare insurance policies distributor and owner of a fast-expanding healthcare services platform, based in Overland Park, Kansas, has expressed its strong disagreement with the claims made in the Department of Justice (DoJ) complaint against several entities in the Medicare Advantage industry. The DoJ complaint, filed last week, accused multiple participants in the industry of wrongdoing. SelectQuote firmly believes that these allegations are unfounded and indicate a misunderstanding of the industry as a whole and the company's business model. SelectQuote's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SLQT.
news.headline: SelectQuote (SLQT) disputes DoJ allegations in Medicare Advantage lawsuit, claims lack of industry knowledge.

news.summary: Wolfspeed, Inc. revealed the addition of Paul Walsh and Mark Jensen to its Board of Directors. The company, a prominent player in silicon carbide technology, designated both appointees to also serve on the Audit Committee. Tom Werner, the Board Chairman, expressed satisfaction with the new appointments, emphasizing the directors' extensive industry expertise. The company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WOLF.
news.headline: Wolfspeed appoints Paul Walsh and Mark Jensen to its board; both to join Audit Committee.

news.summary: AEye, Inc., a top provider of adaptive, high-performance lidar solutions, based in Pleasanton, California, revealed that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) and Glass Lewis, premier independent proxy advisory firms, have advised stockholders to vote using the WHITE PROXY CARD at the upcoming May 15, 2025 Annual Meeting. This recommendation supports AEye's present Board and management, affirming their capability and leadership. The company, listed as Nasdaq: LIDR, is poised for continued success per the recommendations of both advisory firms.
news.headline: ISS and Glass Lewis support AEye’s current board and management and advise rejecting dissident group's nominees for the upcoming Annual Meeting on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Amtech Systems, Inc. will be releasing its fiscal second quarter 2025 financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025, post-market closing on Monday, May 12, 2025. The company, traded under NASDAQ as ASYS, is a prominent producer of equipment and materials for semiconductor manufacturing and packaging. Following this release, a conference call is scheduled on the same day at 5:00 pm ET to provide insights into these results. Key executives like Robert Daigle, the CEO, and Wade Jenke, the CFO, will be leading this discussion.
news.headline: Amtech Systems (NASDAQ: ASYS) to reveal Q2 2025 financial report on May 12, 2025, post-market, with a conference call at 5:00 pm ET.

news.summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE: GLW) and Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. revealed that the Galaxy S25 Edge will showcase the innovative Corning® Gorilla® Glass Ceramic 21 for enhanced protection in a sleek device design. This collaboration aims to combine style and durability in the upcoming flagship smartphone. The new glass ceramic offering will provide advanced defense in a thin form factor, highlighting the partnership's commitment to advancing mobile technology. This joint effort signifies a shared commitment to redefine standards in mobile engineering and deliver a superior user experience.
news.headline: Samsung & Corning announce Galaxy S25 Edge to feature Gorilla Glass Ceramic 21 for enhanced durability.

news.summary: Durham, North Carolina - On May 9, 2025, Humacyte, Inc. (Nasdaq: HUMA), a leading biotechnology platform company in the clinical stage, specializing in the development of bioengineered human tissue that can be universally implanted on a commercial scale, has announced the upcoming release of its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. news.summary: Today in Santa Ana, California, TTM Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTMI) shared news that their Board of Directors has approved a new share repurchase initiative. This program permits the Company to buy back its common stock, with a total market value cap of $100 million, until May 7, 2027. The previous two-year repurchase plan concluded on May 3, 2025.
news.headline: TTM Technologies, Inc. approves $100 million share repurchase program till May 7, 2027, previous program expired on May 3, 2025.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Dallas, Civitas Capital Group and CEO Daniel J. Healy expressed backing for President Donald Trump's innovative Gold Card initiative for investment visas. They see its potential to enhance the established EB-5 Immigrant Investor Program.

news.summary: New confectionery innovations from Ferrero North America are set to be showcased at the upcoming Sweets & Snacks Expo in Parsippany, NJ on May 9, 2025. As part of the Ferrero Group, Ferrero North America aims to continue its tradition of creating delicious treats for consumers. Stay tuned for more updates from this leading sweet-packaged food company.
news.headline: Ferrero plans to boost growth in North America with new innovations like Ferrero Rocher, Tic Tac Dr Pepper, and Nutella Peanut. Heading into Sweets & Snacks Expo.
